solutions.solution: (d) As, 2 18 9 7 8 20 → 3 19 10 8 9 21 (B R I G H T → C S J H I U) with +1 pattern applied to each letter. Similarly, 16 21 14 20 5 18 → 17 22 15 21 6 19 (P U N T E R → Q V O U F S) with +1 pattern applied. ∴ PUNTER ⇒ QVOUFS
(d) As, 14 1 13 5 → 13 26 12 4 (N A M E → M Z L D) with -1 pattern applied to each letter. Similarly, 16 5 15 14 → 15 4 14 13 (P E O N → O D N M) with -1 pattern applied. ∴ PEON ⇒ ODNM

(d) As, 19 16 1 18 11 → 20 17 2 19 12 (S P A R K → T Q B S L) with +1 pattern applied to each letter. Similarly, 6 12 1 13 5 → 7 13 2 14 6 (F L A M E → G M B N F) with +1 pattern applied. ∴ FLAME ⇒ GMBNF
(b) As, 13 1 18 19 → 26 14 5 6 (M A R S → Z N E F) with +13 pattern applied to each letter. Similarly, 1 18 13 19 → 14 5 26 6 (A R M S → N E Z F) with +13 pattern applied. ∴ ARMS ⇒ NEZF
(c) As, 3 15 12 4 → 4 16 13 5 (C O L D → D P M E) with +1 pattern applied to each letter. Similarly, 3 8 9 14 1 → 4 9 10 15 2 (C H I N A → D I J O B) with +1 pattern applied. ∴ CHINA ⇒ DIJOB

(b) As, 19 9 19 20 5 18 → 18 8 18 19 4 17 (S I S T E R → R H R S D Q) with -1 pattern applied to each letter. Similarly, 21 14 3 12 5 → 20 13 2 11 4 (U N C L E → T M B K D) with -1 pattern applied. ∴ UNCLE ⇒ TMBKD

(c) As, 13 1 18 3 8 → 15 3 20 5 10 (M A R C H → O C T E J) with +2 pattern applied to each letter. Similarly, 18 5 20 21 18 14 → 20 7 22 23 20 16 (R E T U R N → T G V W T P) with +2 pattern applied. ∴ RETURN ⇒ TGVWTP
